name: GraniteShares 3x Short GAFAM Daily ETC
summary: GraniteShares 3x Short GAFAM Daily ETC is an exchange-traded commodity (ETC) that provides a leveraged short exposure to a basket of technology companies known as GAFAM (Google, Apple, Facebook, Amazon, and Microsoft). The ETC aims to deliver three times the inverse of the daily performance of the GAFAM stocks. It is designed for sophisticated investors seeking short-term profit from potential declines in these companies' values and is managed by GraniteShares, based in London.
